§7Guide Book #106§r
§lMagic Spells Table§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally in§r: Villager Libraries
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table, Artifacture Table.
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 150.0

•§lHardness§r: 5.0
•§lLuminous§r: 8
•§lFlammable§r: NO
•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Magic Spells Table
•Can be activated using an §lRose Quartz Shard§r for 5-6 minutes.
•The Magic Spells Table is a crafting
table that requires an activation material to function. It is specialized for crafting the magic scrolls.§’
